# Decision Log

DEC-PRODUCT — The user selected the public inspection concept over account-dependent alternatives.

DEC-BRAND — The user selected a calm, direct voice and rejected decorative product personality for the first version.

DEC-1 — The user approved the public inspection P0, product definition, and explicit non-goals after the six-lens planning review.

DEC-17 — The user approved entering visual exploration after the planning structure passed.

DEC-18 — The user selected calm-catalogue from two comparable visual directions.

DEC-19 — The user approved the responsive home key screen and its loading state.

DEC-20 — The user approved the full P0 product-design baseline for engineering handoff.
